Home / Services / Investment Management

Investment Management in Cheltenham and Gloucestershire

Stop paying for
underperformance.

Most actively managed funds fail to beat the market after fees. We build evidence-based portfolios that capture market returns at a fraction of the cost.

Our investment philosophy

Our investment philosophy

We don't try to outsmart the market.

Nobel Prize-winning academic research. Over 100 years of market data. Portfolios designed to capture returns efficiently and let compound growth do the heavy lifting.

Four principles that guide every investment decision

01

Evidence over opinion

Our approach is built on Nobel Prize-winning research from economists like Eugene Fama, Kenneth French, and Harry Markowitz. Over 100 years of market data shows what actually drives returns.

3
Nobel Prizes in economics underpin our investment approach
02

Corporate Finance Advisory

The UK represents just 4% of global markets. Your portfolio holds over 10,000 companies across 40+ countries. As Markowitz proved, diversification is the only "free lunch" in investing.

4%
UK share of global stock market capitalisation
03

Low costs matter

Research shows high costs are the strongest predictor of poor fund performance. Most active managers fail to beat the market after fees. Our fund costs are typically 0.2-0.4% vs 1.5%+ for active funds.

82%
of funds underperform their benchmark over 15 years
04

Stay the course

Since 1926, markets have experienced 7 major declines averaging 35%. Every single one was followed by a recovery. The average recovery took just 1.5 years. Patience is rewarded.

100%
recovery rate from every major market decline in history

Ready to invest with evidence, not emotion?

Most portfolios we review are paying too much for too little. Tim can show you exactly what you're paying and what you're getting for it. No jargon, no pressure.

Watch our documentary

Evidence-Based Investing Explained

Discover why the world's most successful investors use evidence-based strategies, and how this approach can work for you.

100+ Years of empirical data backing our approach
0.2-0.4% Typical fund charges vs 1.5%+ for active funds
10,000+ Companies in a globally diversified portfolio
£100m+ Client assets under management

Why evidence beats emotion

Most investors underperform the market because of emotional decisions - buying high when confident, selling low when scared. Our systematic approach removes emotion from investing, whether you're building towards early retirement or growing long-term wealth.

We use the same evidence-based principles employed by the world's largest pension funds and endowments. Combined with transparent fixed-fee pricing, it's not exciting, but it works.

Common investment questions

What do you invest in?

We build globally diversified portfolios using low-cost index funds. You'll own thousands of companies across developed and emerging markets, tilted towards factors that research shows drive higher expected returns. This forms a key part of your long-term financial plan.

Why don't you pick stocks?

Because it doesn't work reliably. The evidence shows that after costs, the vast majority of stock pickers underperform simple index funds. We'd rather give you the market return at low cost than gamble on beating it. Learn more about how we invest your money.

How do you manage risk?

Through proper diversification and asset allocation. We match your portfolio's risk level to your capacity and need to take risk, then rebalance regularly to maintain your target allocation. This is especially important when building a retirement income strategy.

What are your fees?

We charge transparent fixed fees for advice, agreed upfront. Underlying fund costs are typically 0.2-0.4%, far lower than the 1-2% charged by most actively managed funds. See our full adviser fee structure for details.

Google Reviews

What our clients say

P
Peter Hansford

The rockwealth team has looked after my financial investments for many years, firstly advising on saving strategies during working life and then on through to creating a successful, personal retirement portfolio. For sound, honest and realistic advice then look no further, rockwealth is a credit to their profession and comes highly recommended.

P
Paul Farnworth & Jane Quinn

Tim and the team at rockwealth have been looking after our financial affairs for several years now. They made some changes to what we were doing previously and they're doing an amazing job and we can relax knowing that our finances are being taken care of thoughtfully and professionally. They are really proactive and always looking for the best ways to make maximum returns from our assets.

M
Mike & Rachel Tuffy

The world of pensions and investments is a minefield and one which we shied away from for too long. Matt managed to make the very complicated and confusing topic actually really easy to understand. We have no hesitation in recommending rockwealth and we feel secure in the fact that we have professionals looking after our hard earned cash who are able to talk to us and encourage us to think about life and what we want to get out of it.

I
Ian & Jane Nelder

We have been clients of rockwealth for a number of years now. The rockwealth team has been instrumental in shaping our savings and investment portfolio, including guiding us through making the biggest investment decision we're ever likely to make in respect of our pensions. The team always takes time to clearly explain options available. We've always found rockwealth to be a pleasure to deal with and expect our relationship to last for years to come.
